## ExternalBundleWebpackPluginOptions.enableJsBytecode property

Whether to tag main thread chunks with the `JsBytecode` encoding so the encoder compiles them to bytecode.

**Signature:**

```typescript
enableJsBytecode?: boolean | undefined;
```

## Default Value

`false` when `NODE_ENV` is `'development'`<!-- -->, otherwise `true`

## Remarks

When disabled, main thread chunks are encoded as plain JavaScript source, which keeps them readable for debugging and speeds up encoding.
